architecture.note: NOT mapped to architecture.noUnknownSystemForSourceFile — classic's architecture rule is the evaluator-catalog architecture family, not the ownership-hint check. Mapping them would inflate recall without preserving the guarantee.

system_anomaly.note: Closest Rekon neighbor is architecture.noUnknownSystemForSourceFile, but classic's system_anomaly covers misfit-within-system, not unknown ownership. Left unported until a port slice proves identity.

stub.note: Rekon's classic-inspired stub handling (details.stubName) is a finding FILTER, not an emitter. No emitter port exists yet.
